agentskills_spec.title: Agent Skills Specification
agentskills_spec.notes: Defines SKILL.md, frontmatter, scripts/references/assets, progressive disclosure, validation.

skills_sh.title: skills.sh documentation
skills_sh.notes: Documents npx skills add, leaderboard, telemetry, security caveats.

github_copilot_skills.title: GitHub Copilot agent skills docs
github_copilot_skills.notes: Defines project/personal skill locations, gh skill preview/install/update/publish, pinning, warning about unverified skills.

github_copilot_custom_agents.title: GitHub Copilot custom agents docs
github_copilot_custom_agents.notes: Defines repo and org/enterprise custom agent profile locations and cross-surface usage.

github_copilot_agent_config.title: GitHub custom agents configuration reference
github_copilot_agent_config.notes: Documents YAML frontmatter, tool selection, MCP server config, secret syntax, public-preview caveats.

claude_code_skills.title: Claude Code skills
claude_code_skills.notes: Defines personal/project/plugin skills, model invocation, allowed-tools, team sharing.

claude_code_plugins.title: Claude Code plugins
claude_code_plugins.notes: Plugins bundle commands, agents, hooks, skills, MCP servers, LSP servers, monitors.

claude_code_hooks.title: Claude Code hooks
claude_code_hooks.notes: Documents hook event types and command/http/mcp_tool/prompt/agent hook behavior.

openai_apps_sdk.title: OpenAI Apps SDK help
openai_apps_sdk.notes: Apps SDK is preview, built on MCP, enables ChatGPT app UI and logic.

openai_gpt_actions.title: OpenAI GPT Actions configuration
openai_gpt_actions.notes: Actions use OpenAPI schema and auth modes none/API key/OAuth; GPTs use apps or actions but not both.

openai_docs_mcp.title: OpenAI Docs MCP
openai_docs_mcp.notes: Documents public OpenAI developer docs MCP server and Codex/Cursor/VS Code installation examples.

codex_launch.title: OpenAI Codex launch
codex_launch.notes: Codex runs tasks in cloud sandbox environments and can perform many tasks in parallel.

openai_agents_sdk.title: OpenAI Agents SDK
openai_agents_sdk.notes: Agents SDK supports tools, handoffs, streaming, and tracing.

cursor_cli.title: Cursor CLI docs
cursor_cli.notes: Cursor CLI supports interactive and non-interactive terminal agents.

cursor_cli_using.title: Cursor CLI usage
cursor_cli_using.notes: CLI reads MCP config, rules, AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md, supports --output-format json/text.

cursor_mcp_cli.title: Cursor CLI MCP
cursor_mcp_cli.notes: cursor-agent mcp list/list-tools/login/disable and shared editor/CLI config.

cursor_background.title: Cursor background agents
cursor_background.notes: Background agents run in isolated Ubuntu machines, use GitHub integration, environment.json, encrypted secrets, and auto-run commands.

cursor_background_api.title: Cursor Background Agents API
cursor_background_api.notes: Beta API for programmatically creating/managing background agents; up to 256 active agents per API key.

gemini_extensions.title: Gemini CLI extensions
gemini_extensions.notes: Gemini extensions package prompts, MCP servers, custom commands; workspace config takes precedence.

gemini_extensions_getting_started.title: Gemini CLI extension getting started
gemini_extensions_getting_started.notes: gemini extensions new/install/update flows and gemini-extension.json structure.

gemini_mcp_config.title: Gemini CLI MCP configuration
gemini_mcp_config.notes: mcpServers support command/url/httpUrl precedence and tool name conflict prefixing.

cherry_mcp_config.title: Cherry Studio MCP config
cherry_mcp_config.notes: Cherry MCP UI can configure stdio servers with command uvx and args.

cherry_mcp_install.title: Cherry Studio MCP environment install
cherry_mcp_install.notes: Cherry uses built-in uv and bun in ~/.cherrystudio/bin rather than system installs.

cherry_mcp_auto.title: Cherry Studio automatic MCP install
cherry_mcp_auto.notes: Auto-install requires v1.1.18+ and is currently testing-phase.

perplexity_local_mcp.title: Perplexity local and remote MCPs
perplexity_local_mcp.notes: Local MCP available for macOS Mac App Store app; remote MCP coming soon; helper app required.

perplexity_mcp_server.title: Perplexity MCP server
perplexity_mcp_server.notes: Perplexity MCP server offers one-click Cursor/VS Code install and manual API-key setup.

antigravity_google_blog.title: Google Developers Blog: Antigravity
antigravity_google_blog.notes: Antigravity combines Editor View and Manager surface; agents operate across editor, terminal, browser and produce artifacts.

google_gemini3_antigravity.title: Google Gemini 3 launch with Antigravity
google_gemini3_antigravity.notes: Gemini 3 announcement states Antigravity gives agents direct access to editor, terminal, browser and task-oriented operation.

mcp_transports.title: MCP transports
mcp_transports.notes: MCP uses JSON-RPC over stdio and Streamable HTTP; clients should support stdio where possible; Streamable HTTP security warnings.

mcp_authorization.title: MCP authorization
mcp_authorization.notes: HTTP authorization is optional but OAuth 2.1-based when supported; stdio should retrieve credentials from environment.

mcp_registry.title: Official MCP Registry
mcp_registry.notes: Official registry preview; breaking changes/data resets possible; server.json metadata, namespace verification.

mcp_scan.title: Invariant MCP-Scan
mcp_scan.notes: Scans MCP configs for prompt injection, tool poisoning, rug pulls, cross-origin escalation; quickstart uvx mcp-scan@latest.

pulsemcp.title: PulseMCP server directory
pulsemcp.notes: Large MCP server directory with filters/classifications and usage-signal estimates.

mcp_directory.title: MCP.Directory awesome MCP servers
mcp_directory.notes: Curated category directory for browser, DB, search, developer tools, cloud, security, productivity.

awesome_mcp_abordage.title: abordage/awesome-mcp
awesome_mcp_abordage.notes: Automated, curated, ranked MCP list updated daily with GitHub activity metrics.

awesome_copilot.title: Awesome GitHub Copilot skills
awesome_copilot.notes: Community-created catalog with hundreds of Copilot agent skills.

crewai_skills.title: CrewAI Skills
crewai_skills.notes: CrewAI publishes official skill pack on skills.sh and installs via npx skills add crewaiinc/skills.

openspec.title: OpenSpec official site
openspec.notes: OpenSpec organizes changes as proposal.md, design.md, tasks.md, specs/ deltas.

otel_genai.title: OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions
otel_genai.notes: GenAI semantic conventions are development status; include metrics/spans/events and MCP semconv links.

langfuse.title: Langfuse observability docs
langfuse.notes: LLM tracing captures prompts, responses, token usage, latency, tools, retrieval steps; async SDK export.

phoenix.title: Arize Phoenix docs
phoenix.notes: Phoenix provides tracing, evaluation, prompt engineering, datasets/experiments on OpenTelemetry/OpenInference.
